# Caterpillars & Inchworms

by Nebula Haze
## Stop Caterpillars From Attacking Your Cannabis!
Caterpillars!!! Argh!!! Sometimes the first sign of caterpillars / worms / cabbage loopers is just seeing chunks of your leaves missing. You may also see clumps of black/brown “dirt” on your leaves, which is caterpillar poop. Lastly, you may actually catch a caterpillar munching on your leaves. It can be angering to catch them in the act.
Caterpillars are one of the most common cannabis pests when growing weed outdoors. Use a [BT Caterpillar spray](https://www.amazon.com/Southern-Ag-13022-Thuricide-Caterpillar/dp/B004QJ33B4?dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.Nk6kBTqzEclcdOYlyGsK-mnOnaT3GgtMBPT7fsWpGvJAigOVqgMPWZs6xUYxQsYiWTnKgTidnYhVC6qNFdLVF6AO_LI0NXAFnl_wqJzdJhvXRcWlqJdSCLGZCBYSwnv0Y-1V_gmTswMDJWAUK0o95bfng2BVE-nLYUatBkVB7U1lSlBTNdnTKTIaDhYJKW-N5nBqLE59I8MEkGDMGFxy4CrSV0WRuC6ari3cDYCBXOl6cKCEgQGXhfJDLwvO4hkNpc4-y9vgjO4MUARJhZarFev_nHOAy4a7t6DaV5zJzIY.UWi9cinODo8M1QNZOCXuhmNlb7jJvcWOuHA6GOdu468&dib_tag=se&keywords=bt+caterpillar+killer&qid=1726430786&sr=8-2&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=df9ac27e6e24b21e857f5b221d7ce3f3&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (works best if you apply it with a [mister](https://www.amazon.com/Chapin-International-Herbicides-1003-Translucent/dp/B0009KM29S?pd_rd_i=B0009KM29S&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=a3de2b42306c7aa8956a4555dc011f77&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)) as a safe and effective way to eradicate them for good.
[**Recommended: Southern Ag Thuricide BT Caterpillar Control**](https://www.amazon.com/Southern-Ag-13022-Thuricide-Caterpillar/dp/B004QJ33B4?dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.Nk6kBTqzEclcdOYlyGsK-mnOnaT3GgtMBPT7fsWpGvJAigOVqgMPWZs6xUYxQsYiWTnKgTidnYhVC6qNFdLVF6AO_LI0NXAFnl_wqJzdJhvXRcWlqJdSCLGZCBYSwnv0Y-1V_gmTswMDJWAUK0o95bfng2BVE-nLYUatBkVB7U1lSlBTNdnTKTIaDhYJKW-N5nBqLE59I8MEkGDMGFxy4CrSV0WRuC6ari3cDYCBXOl6cKCEgQGXhfJDLwvO4hkNpc4-y9vgjO4MUARJhZarFev_nHOAy4a7t6DaV5zJzIY.UWi9cinODo8M1QNZOCXuhmNlb7jJvcWOuHA6GOdu468&dib_tag=se&keywords=bt+caterpillar+killer&qid=1726430786&sr=8-2&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=df9ac27e6e24b21e857f5b221d7ce3f3&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) + a [mister](https://www.amazon.com/Chapin-International-Herbicides-1003-Translucent/dp/B0009KM29S?pd_rd_i=B0009KM29S&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=3a427c07aa92fc9e5bc78f1a60fc5085&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)  
(though any caterpillar BT product will work!)  
[](https://www.amazon.com/Southern-Ag-13022-Thuricide-Caterpillar/dp/B004QJ33B4?dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.Nk6kBTqzEclcdOYlyGsK-mnOnaT3GgtMBPT7fsWpGvJAigOVqgMPWZs6xUYxQsYiWTnKgTidnYhVC6qNFdLVF6AO_LI0NXAFnl_wqJzdJhvXRcWlqJdSCLGZCBYSwnv0Y-1V_gmTswMDJWAUK0o95bfng2BVE-nLYUatBkVB7U1lSlBTNdnTKTIaDhYJKW-N5nBqLE59I8MEkGDMGFxy4CrSV0WRuC6ari3cDYCBXOl6cKCEgQGXhfJDLwvO4hkNpc4-y9vgjO4MUARJhZarFev_nHOAy4a7t6DaV5zJzIY.UWi9cinODo8M1QNZOCXuhmNlb7jJvcWOuHA6GOdu468&dib_tag=se&keywords=bt+caterpillar+killer&qid=1726430786&sr=8-2&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=df9ac27e6e24b21e857f5b221d7ce3f3&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) [](https://www.amazon.com/Chapin-International-Herbicides-1003-Translucent/dp/B0009KM29S?pd_rd_i=B0009KM29S&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=a3de2b42306c7aa8956a4555dc011f77&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
**What is a “Thuricide”?** Thuricide is just a brand name for a specific company’s BT (_Bacillus thuringiensis_) Caterpillar insecticide. It is popular and effective, but any BT caterpillar killer works for your cannabis plants. Essentially, “Thuricide” is just a marketing term, and not a particular type of insecticide.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/caterpillar-lives-inside-bud-cannabis.jpg)
Zebra caterpillar on a cannabis leaf, picture by [Whitney Cranshaw of Colorado State University](https://www.forestryimages.org/browse/detail.cfm?imgnum=5559976)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/caterpillar-damage-cannabis-leaf-by-whitney-cranshaw.jpg)
Saltmarsh caterpillar on cannabis leaf, picture by [Whitney Cranshaw of Colorado State University](https://www.forestryimages.org/browse/detail.cfm?imgnum=5556161)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/saltmarsh-caterpillar-on-cannabis-leaf.jpg)
Another saltmarsh caterpillar on a marijuana leaf, picture by [Whitney Cranshaw of Colorado State University](https://www.forestryimages.org/browse/detail.cfm?imgnum=5559963) (thank you!!!)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/saltmarsh-caterpillar-on-marijuana-leaf.jpg)
You’ll see chunks of your leaves missing from the caterpillars devouring your leaves
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/caterpillar-damage-cannabis-leaves.jpg)  
_caterpillar leaf damage pic by molpes_
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/caterpillar-inchworm-leaf-damage.jpg)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/caterpillar-worm-damage-back-of-leaf.jpg)
**Caterpillar Droppings on Leaves**
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/caterpillar-poop-on-leaf.jpg)
**You Actually See Caterpillars, Inchworms or Cabbage Loopers**
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/caterpillar-inch-worm-on-cannabis-leaf.jpg)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sites/growweedeasy.com/files/example-caterpillar-on-marijuana-leaf.jpg)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/caterpillar-inch-worm.jpg)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/cannabis-caterpillar.jpg)[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/caterpillar-on-finger.jpg)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/green-caterpillar-chewing-on-cannabis-leaves.jpg)  
_caterpillar pic by Waterproof_
Proven Caterpillar Remedies
**[Caterpillar “BT” Spray](https://www.amazon.com/Southern-Ag-13022-Thuricide-Caterpillar/dp/B004QJ33B4?dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.Nk6kBTqzEclcdOYlyGsK-mnOnaT3GgtMBPT7fsWpGvJAigOVqgMPWZs6xUYxQsYiWTnKgTidnYhVC6qNFdLVF6AO_LI0NXAFnl_wqJzdJhvXRcWlqJdSCLGZCBYSwnv0Y-1V_gmTswMDJWAUK0o95bfng2BVE-nLYUatBkVB7U1lSlBTNdnTKTIaDhYJKW-N5nBqLE59I8MEkGDMGFxy4CrSV0WRuC6ari3cDYCBXOl6cKCEgQGXhfJDLwvO4hkNpc4-y9vgjO4MUARJhZarFev_nHOAy4a7t6DaV5zJzIY.UWi9cinODo8M1QNZOCXuhmNlb7jJvcWOuHA6GOdu468&dib_tag=se&keywords=bt+caterpillar+killer&qid=1726430786&sr=8-2&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=df9ac27e6e24b21e857f5b221d7ce3f3&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (safe biological insecticide) **
This biological insecticide contains the  _bacillus thuringiensis_ (BT) bacteria which kills larva and prevents caterpillars from being able to eat. This is one of the most effective ways to kill caterpillars, and won’t hurt most beneficial insects. As a bonus, it also kills other cannabis pests like fungus gnats, worms and moths.
Apply a caterpillar BT spray as soon as you see leaf damage, caterpillars or caterpillar poop. BT sprays work best on small caterpillars that are actively eating your leaves. Repeat every week for as long as you’re still seeing caterpillars, though you can give BT more often if there’s a heavy infestation. Make sure to thoroughly mist both the tops and bottoms of leaves, and apply again after a heavy rain (since that will wash the BT away). Since BT is harmless to humans, you can use BT products up to the day of harvest! One thing to keep in mind is BT spray almost instantly stops caterpillars from being able to eat, but doesn’t kill them directly. So although you may see the caterpillars alive and apparently unharmed after spraying, the BT is still doing its dirty work.
**What is a “Thuricide”?** Thuricide is just a brand name for a specific company’s BT (_Bacillus thuringiensis_) Caterpillar insecticide. It is popular and effective, but any BT caterpillar killer works for your cannabis plants. Essentially, “Thuricide” is just a marketing term, and not a particular type of insecticide.
[**Recommended: Southern Ag Thuricide BT Caterpillar Control**](https://www.amazon.com/Southern-Ag-13022-Thuricide-Caterpillar/dp/B004QJ33B4?dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.Nk6kBTqzEclcdOYlyGsK-mnOnaT3GgtMBPT7fsWpGvJAigOVqgMPWZs6xUYxQsYiWTnKgTidnYhVC6qNFdLVF6AO_LI0NXAFnl_wqJzdJhvXRcWlqJdSCLGZCBYSwnv0Y-1V_gmTswMDJWAUK0o95bfng2BVE-nLYUatBkVB7U1lSlBTNdnTKTIaDhYJKW-N5nBqLE59I8MEkGDMGFxy4CrSV0WRuC6ari3cDYCBXOl6cKCEgQGXhfJDLwvO4hkNpc4-y9vgjO4MUARJhZarFev_nHOAy4a7t6DaV5zJzIY.UWi9cinODo8M1QNZOCXuhmNlb7jJvcWOuHA6GOdu468&dib_tag=se&keywords=bt+caterpillar+killer&qid=1726430786&sr=8-2&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=df9ac27e6e24b21e857f5b221d7ce3f3&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) + a [mister](https://www.amazon.com/Chapin-International-Herbicides-1003-Translucent/dp/B0009KM29S?pd_rd_i=B0009KM29S&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=3a427c07aa92fc9e5bc78f1a60fc5085&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)  
(though any caterpillar BT product will work!)  
[](https://www.amazon.com/Southern-Ag-13022-Thuricide-Caterpillar/dp/B004QJ33B4?dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.Nk6kBTqzEclcdOYlyGsK-mnOnaT3GgtMBPT7fsWpGvJAigOVqgMPWZs6xUYxQsYiWTnKgTidnYhVC6qNFdLVF6AO_LI0NXAFnl_wqJzdJhvXRcWlqJdSCLGZCBYSwnv0Y-1V_gmTswMDJWAUK0o95bfng2BVE-nLYUatBkVB7U1lSlBTNdnTKTIaDhYJKW-N5nBqLE59I8MEkGDMGFxy4CrSV0WRuC6ari3cDYCBXOl6cKCEgQGXhfJDLwvO4hkNpc4-y9vgjO4MUARJhZarFev_nHOAy4a7t6DaV5zJzIY.UWi9cinODo8M1QNZOCXuhmNlb7jJvcWOuHA6GOdu468&dib_tag=se&keywords=bt+caterpillar+killer&qid=1726430786&sr=8-2&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=df9ac27e6e24b21e857f5b221d7ce3f3&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) [](https://www.amazon.com/Chapin-International-Herbicides-1003-Translucent/dp/B0009KM29S?pd_rd_i=B0009KM29S&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=a3de2b42306c7aa8956a4555dc011f77&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
**[Spinosad Products](https://www.amazon.com/s/?_encoding=UTF8&camp=1789&creative=390957&keywords=spinosad&linkCode=ur2&qid=1376756944&rh=n%3A2972638011%2Ck%3Aspinosad&rnid=2941120011&tag=growwcom07-20) (safe & organic)**
Although not as effective against caterpillars as a BT product, Spinosad can be a good choice, especially if your plants are also suffering from other insects like aphids, spider mites, thrips or white flies since this will attack all of them at once. Spinosad products are organic and **completely harmless to pets, children, and plants**. Unlike many insecticides, you can spray properly diluted spinosad heavily on leaves and roots with basically no negative effects. Spinosad products can be used directly to kill caterpillars on contact, but can also be used when watering plants to systematically kill caterpillars via the soil.Spinosad is an organic insecticide made from the fermentation of a specific soil bacteria (_actinomycete Saccharopolyspora spinosa_) and kills caterpillars via ingestion or contact by effecting the insect nervous system. Spinosad can be a good choice for organic and outdoor growers, because it is very toxic to caterpillars, but is less toxic to many beneficial insects. Note: Most spinosad products are effective for only about 24 hours after being mixed with water, so only mix as much as you will need per application. Anything left over will be a waste. WARNING: [Commercial growers click here!](https://www.growweedeasy.com/is-spinosad-safe-for-growing-weed)
[**Recommended:** Monterey Garden Insect Spray with Spinosad](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B002BP12LI/ref=as_li_ss_til?tag=growwcom07-20&camp=0&creative=0&linkCode=as4&creativeASIN=B002BP12LI&adid=0FYYR29P4ZPQZW29B0QQ&) (not for [commercial growers](https://www.growweedeasy.com/is-spinosad-safe-for-growing-weed))
[](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B002BP12LI/ref=as_li_ss_til?tag=growwcom07-20&camp=0&creative=0&linkCode=as4&creativeASIN=B002BP12LI&adid=0FYYR29P4ZPQZW29B0QQ&) [](https://www.amazon.com/Chapin-International-Herbicides-1003-Translucent/dp/B0009KM29S?pd_rd_i=B0009KM29S&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=a3de2b42306c7aa8956a4555dc011f77&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
**Avoid butterflies and moths!** Although these beautiful creatures look great resting on your cannabis plants, they lay eggs that hatch into caterpillars. Don’t let them hang around your garden.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/yellow-butterfly-can-lay-caterpillar-eggs.jpg)
* * *
[More Cannabis Pests, Bugs & Viruses](https://www.growweedeasy.com/bugs-pests-symptoms-marijuana-grow)

## Plant Symptoms
  * [Bronze or brown patches](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/bronze-spots-or-patches)
  * [Brown or slimy roots](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/roots-are-brown-smelly-or-slimy)
  * [Brown or yellow leaf tips/edges](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/brown-yellow-or-burnt-edges-or-tips)
  * [Buds dying](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/buds-dying)
  * [Buds look odd](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/buds-look-odd)
  * [Bugs are visible](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/i-see-bugs)
  * [Curling or clawing leaves](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/curling-or-clawing-leaves)
  * [Dark leaves](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/dark-green)
  * [Drooping plant](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/drooping-plant)
  * [Holes in leaves](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/holes-in-leaves)
  * [Mold or powder](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/mold-or-white-powder)
  * [Pink or purple on leaves](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/pink-or-purple-on-leaves)
  * [Red stems](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/red-stems)
  * [Shiny or smooth leaves](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/shiny-or-smooth-leaves)
  * [Spots or markings](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/spots-or-markings-on-leaves)
  * [Twisted growth](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/twisted-growth)
  * [Webbing](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/webbing)
  * [Wilting leaves](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/wilting-leaves)
  * [Yellow between leaf veins](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/yellow-between-leaf-veins)
  * [Yellow leaves](https://www.growweedeasy.com/plant-problems-symptoms/yellow-leaves)

This page is part of our Plant Doctor series. You can use our tool to filter by symptom and help [diagnose your plant](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-symptoms-pictures).

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
